design_philosophy: High legibility, precision, and trust. Uses crisp off-white backgrounds with high-contrast slate actions. Employs a 'Control Room' style bento layout for the dashboard. Minimalist styling with sharp typography for scientific exactness. No AI-slop purple gradients.

spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: min-h-[56px] for primary buttons, min-h-[48px] for list items

login.layout: Vertical stack. Top 40% uses 'login_background' image with gradient overlay fading to bg-slate-50. Bottom 60% contains the form.
components: Input fields: Email, Password (h-14, rounded-2xl, bg-white, border border-slate-200, px-4)
Primary CTA: 'Sign In' (bg-slate-900, text-white, h-14, rounded-full, w-full, testID='login-submit-button')

home.layout: Bento Grid approach. Top hero tile, split bottom tiles.
components: Hero Tile: 'Scan Plate' - full width, bg-slate-900, rounded-3xl, p-8. Uses 'home_hero_bg' as a subtle masked background. White text. Large ScanLine icon.
Row Tiles: 'History' & 'Settings' - half-width, bg-white, rounded-2xl, border border-slate-200, p-6. Top-aligned icons, bottom-aligned text.
Step 1 & 2: Searchable Dropdown. Large sticky search bar (h-14). FlatList of items. Selected item has blue checkmark. 'Other' reveals inline TextInput.
Step 3 (Camera): Full-screen Camera view. Cutout overlay for 6mm disc alignment. Bottom floating shutter button.

Step 4 (Measurement): Image preview centered. Overlay of a red dashed circle (border-red-500, border-2, border-dashed, rounded-full). Bottom sheet for manual correction containing +/- 0.1mm stepper buttons and a 'Confirm Measurement' primary CTA.

results.layout: Scrollable View with distinct data cards (bg-white, rounded-2xl, p-5).
components: Top Image: Cropped agar image with final measurement ring overlay.
Hero Metric: '24 mm' centered. Pill badge: 'S - Sensitive' (bg-emerald-50, text-emerald-700).
Organisms Section: Ranked list. Each item shows organism name and a confidence progress bar (bg-slate-900).
AI Explanation: Card with bg-blue-50, border-l-4 border-blue-500, Sparkles icon, text-blue-900. testID='ai-explanation-card'.
Disclaimer: Sticky bottom text: 'For educational/research purposes only' (text-xs, text-slate-500, centered).

history.layout: Chronological FlatList with sticky section headers for months.
components: List Item: Row layout. Left: Date (Overline style). Title: Sample Type + Antibiotic. Right: Zone mm + S/I/R colored pill. border-b border-slate-100 py-4. testID='history-item'.

settings.layout: SectionList grouped by Account, App, Data, Support, About.
components: Section Header: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-500 mt-6 mb-2 ml-4
Row Item: bg-white px-4 py-4 flex-row justify-between items-center border-b border-slate-100. Toggle switches for App settings.

login_background.description: Clean medical laboratory environment. Use as a top-screen background with a white gradient overlay for the login screen to establish clinical context.

home_hero_bg.description: Microbiologist holding agar plates. Use as a low-opacity image mask inside the 'Scan Plate' main bento tile on the Home screen.

placeholder_agar.description: Red petri dish, use as a placeholder image for testing the measurement screen or history list thumbnails before actual camera integration is complete.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app. Translate the provided Tailwind utility classes into NativeWind conventions (e.g., using `className` on Views and Texts).
CRITICAL: All interactive elements (Pressable, TouchableOpacity, TextInput) MUST include `testID` attribute (e.g., `testID='login-submit-button'`).
For the camera overlay (6mm circle), use a full-screen `<View>` with an absolutely positioned inner `<View>` that has `borderRadius` and extremely thick `borderWidth` to create a 'cutout' effect.
For the zone measurement step, implement manual correction logic via +/- stepper buttons in the bottom sheet or PinchGestureHandler if feasible in the current environment.
Build bespoke components (Cards, Buttons, Inputs) using React Native primitives + NativeWind. Do not attempt to use HTML-based Shadcn components.
Layouts must be mobile-first: large touch targets (min 56px for primary actions), KeyboardAvoidingViews for inputs, and safe area insets via `useSafeAreaInsets` or NativeWind's safe classes.
DO NOT use Inter font. Configure `tailwind.config.js` to map `font-manrope` and `font-plex` for React Native Text components.
Create .js files with ES6 modules, not .tsx.
Never use fully transparent backgrounds behind text unless it is over a guaranteed solid, high-contrast area.
